name: Business Decision Engine
description: A seed for testing business decisions through the 5 question operators. Each tension is a real choice where the answer isn't obvious.

tensions.claim: Flat pricing is simpler but per-seat pricing captures more value from larger customers
Adding features increases perceived value but dilutes the core reason customers came
Hiring before revenue is a bet on growth; hiring after revenue is a bet on efficiency
Content marketing builds long-term authority but paid acquisition delivers immediate pipeline

direction: Find the non-obvious answer in each business decision by applying inversion and boundary analysis
